content.content:
1	require "test_helper"
     2	
     3	class RoomsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
     4	  setup do
     5	    sign_in :david
     6	  end
     7	
     8	  test "index redirects to the user's last room" do
     9	    get rooms_url
    10	    assert_redirected_to room_url(users(:david).rooms.last)
    11	  end
    12	
    13	  test "show" do
    14	    get room_url(users(:david).rooms.last)
    15	    assert_response :success
    16	  end
    17	
    18	  test "shows records the last room visited in a cookie" do
    19	    get room_url(users(:david).rooms.last)
    20	    assert response.cookies[:last_room] = users(:david).rooms.last.id
    21	  end
    22	
    23	  test "destroy" do
    24	    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts :rooms, count: 1 do
    25	      assert_difference -> { Room.count }, -1 do
    26	        delete room_url(rooms(:designers))
    27	      end
    28	    end
    29	  end
    30

content.text: The bug is clear: the controller redirects to the user's *first* room, but the intended (and tested) behavior is the *last* room.

content.content: The file /Users/sal/Projects/ctxpack/tmp/tier2-expansion/campfire/workspaces/t2-3-treatment-3/app/controllers/rooms_controller.rb has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

tool_use_result.originalFile:
class RoomsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_room, only: %i[ show destroy ]
  before_action :ensure_can_administer, only: %i[ destroy ]
  before_action :remember_last_room_visited, only: :show

  def index
    redirect_to room_url(Current.user.rooms.first)
  end

  def show
    @messages = find_messages
  end

  def destroy
    @room.destroy

    broadcast_remove_room
    redirect_to root_url
  end

  private
    def set_room
      if room = Current.user.rooms.find_by(id: params[:room_id] || params[:id])
        @room = room
      else
        redirect_to root_url, alert: "Room not found or inaccessible"
      end
    end

    def ensure_can_administer
      head :forbidden unless Current.user.can_administer?(@room)
    end

    def ensure_permission_to_create_rooms
      if Current.account.settings.restrict_room_creation_to_administrators? && !Current.user.administrator?
        head :forbidden
      end
    end

    def find_messages
      messages = @room.messages.with_creator.with_attachment_details.with_boosts

      if show_first_message = messages.find_by(id: params[:message_id])
        @messages = messages.page_around(show_first_message)
      else
        @messages = messages.last_page
      end
    end

    def room_params
      params.require(:room).permit(:name)
    end

    def broadcast_remove_room
      broadcast_remove_to :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
    end
end

content.text: All 5 tests pass. The bug was `Current.user.rooms.first` instead of `.last` in `RoomsController#index` (app/controllers/rooms_controller.rb:7) — fixed with a one-line change, no test files touched.
